tagline.en: Day and night are the same length today!
tagline.da: Dag og nat er lige lange i dag!

theme.hero_task: Harvest kale for a kale chip snack

tasks.action: Harvest kale leaves for homemade kale chips

prompt.en: Pick big kale leaves, tear them up, toss with oil and salt, bake until crispy!
prompt.da: Pluk store groenkalsblade, riv dem i stykker, vend i olie og salt, bag til de er sprode!

tasks.action: Pick last tomatoes from Bed C -- bring green ones inside to ripen

prompt.en: Pick all remaining tomatoes -- green ones ripen on the windowsill in the sun!
prompt.da: Pluk alle resterende tomater -- groenne modner paa vindueskarmen i solen!

tasks.action: Water only if soil is dry

prompt.en: Autumn rain usually helps now -- just check and water if dry.
prompt.da: Efteraarsregn hjaelper normalt nu -- tjek bare og vand hvis toert.

tasks.action: Pick last peppers from Bed C

prompt.en: Last peppers of the year! Even if they're still green, they taste fine.
prompt.da: Aarets sidste peberfrugter! Selv hvis de stadig er groenne, smager de fint.

tasks.action: Clear spent tomato and pepper plants from Bed C

prompt.en: Pull out the tomato and pepper plants -- they're done for the year. Compost them.
prompt.da: Traek tomat- og peberplanterne op -- de er faerdige for i aar. Laeg dem i kompost.

growth_events.event: Kale thriving in cooler weather -- leaves large and sweet

prompt.en: Kale is a cool-weather champion! It actually gets better as it gets colder.
prompt.da: Groenkal er en kulde-mester! Den bliver faktisk bedre, naar det bliver koldere.

growth_events.event: Chives still producing but growth slowing

prompt.en: The chives are still going! Snip some for a baked potato topping.
prompt.da: Purloeg baerer stadig! Klip nogle til en bagt kartoffel-topping.
